violations.description: TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Produce and dairy cooler mounted thermometers are damaged and are not easily readable and accurate.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Shelving and walls in west walk in freezer not properly sealed.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Wood shelving and walls in west walk in freezer noted not properly designed. Walk-in cooler door seal for produce cooler noted not in good repair.
